purpose: The owner-facing view. Shows goal progress, verified nodes, blockers, risk, cost, and pending decisions. Generated ONLY from verified events, approved decisions, receipts, and budget snapshots. Never contains agent conversation, chain-of-thought, or self-reported completion.
generated_from_only: Broker-owned Work Node state (never Agent self-report)

field_contract.owner: Who this projection is addressed to (the accountable owner).
field_contract.generated_at: UTC ISO. Projections are snapshots; a new decision regenerates a new projection.

goal_progress.total_nodes: Count of work nodes under the goal.

field_contract.nodes: Per-node summary array. Each: {work_node_id, milestone, status, verified_at, risk_ceiling, blocker (nullable), traceability}.

traceability.diff_ref: Workspace-relative path to the change set.
traceability.test_result_ref: Path to the test-result.json the verifier read.
traceability.action_receipt_count: Number of receipts in the node's chain.

cost.cost_to_date_usd: Sum of all action-receipt costs for the goal, including denied/frozen/retry actions.
cost.cost_per_verified_node_usd: cost_to_date / verified (null if verified=0). This is the Cost-per-Adopted-Outcome primitive.
cost.note: Cost includes failures and rework; it is not just the successful-path cost.

field_contract.pending_decisions: Array of items requiring THIS owner's action: {decision_id, kind (approve_l4|unblock|budget_increase|accept_risk), node_ref, why, evidence_ref, deadline, reversible (bool)}.
field_contract.risk_flags: Array of drifting/at-risk signals: {kind (grant_expiring|budget_overrun|verification_failed|scope_violation), node_ref, detail}.
field_contract.verified_outcomes: Verified-only node summaries with the independent verification time and evidence hash.
field_contract.blockers: Broker-derived blocked Work Nodes with their reason and evidence reference.
field_contract.decision_requests: Enterprise-compatible alias for pending_decisions; P0 emits an empty array until approval routing is connected.
field_contract.cost_status: Budget comparison state. P0 emits not_evaluated_against_goal_budget until goal budget snapshots are connected.
field_contract.evidence_refs: Sanitized traceability references included in the projection; never raw Agent conversation or source contents.
field_contract.human_readable_summary: 3-5 plain sentences the owner can read in 10 seconds: what is verified, what is blocked and why, what decision is needed. No jargon, no agent self-report.

invariants: A node appears as 'verified' ONLY if verify-work-node.ps1 wrote status=verified. Agent self-report never surfaces here.
A node whose grant is revoked/expired appears as blocked with the revocation reason.
Every verified node in the projection is traceable to a diff, a test result, an evidence hash, and a policy version.
The projection is regenerated per decision event; it is a derived snapshot, never hand-edited.
